summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The preflight artifact reports all 25 listed PRs open, non-security-sensitive, and no shared canonical; blocked_actions disallow merge, fix, and raise_pr, and low-signal/instant closeout is disabled. Each PR is therefore kept as an independent backlog item with its own live target timestamp.
